attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WAT.AR_TRX_KEY,
WAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER,
WAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
WAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
WAT.AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE,
WAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
WAT.AR_TRX_REASON_CODE,
WAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG,
WAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE,
WAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
WAT.RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
WAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY,
WAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,
WAT.SS_CODE,
WAT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
WAT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WAT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
WAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WAT.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME, 
WAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WAT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME, 
WAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
WAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT,
WAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG,
/* Start : Q2FY15 LSS AR */
WAT.DISPUTED_ROLE,
WAT.RU_WITH_COMP_DATE_ROLE,
WAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD,
WAT.RU_COMPENSATION_DTM,
WAT.RU_DV_COMPENSATION_DT,
/* End : Q2FY15 LSS AR */
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_LOCAL_TRX_DT,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_LOCAL_TRX_NUM,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_AOA_ISSUE_DT,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_AOA_NUM,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_UPFRONT_BILLING_FLG,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_CORRECTION_NUM,
WAT.RU_RUSSIA_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
WAT.RUSSIA_ROLE,
WAT.ICMS_DEAL_ID_INFO_TXT ,/*ADDED AS PART OF ACCRUED REBATES Q1FY20*/
WAT.HYBRID_INVOICE_FLG,
WAT.DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL1_REASON_CD,/*ADDED AS PART OF FLEXI INVOICE*/
WAT.DV_AR_TRX_LEVEL2_REASON_CD
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_AR_TRX WAT WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
WHERE WAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
